data.title: Write RED structural boundary tests for WORKTREE_TRACKING:start protocol
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Context
Story 06da-ab37 adds WORKTREE_TRACKING:start write instructions to sprint SKILL.md, fix-bug SKILL.md, and task-execution.md, plus a new contract spec document. This task writes the failing structural boundary tests BEFORE any implementation occurs.

## Files to Create
- tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh

## Implementation Steps
1. Read tests/skills/test-brainstorm-tag-writer.sh and tests/hooks/test-behavioral-testing-standard-rule5.sh to understand the structural boundary test pattern.
2. Create tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh with these 6 tests:
   - test_contract_spec_exists: assert plugins/dso/docs/contracts/worktree-tracking-comment.md file exists
   - test_contract_spec_start_section: assert the contract doc contains a ":start" section heading
   - test_contract_spec_complete_and_landed_sections: assert the contract doc contains ":complete" and ":landed" section headings
   - test_sprint_skill_worktree_tracking_start_present: grep sprint SKILL.md for "WORKTREE_TRACKING:start" and confirm it appears after "ticket transition.*in_progress" in Phase 1
   - test_fixbug_skill_worktree_tracking_start_present: grep fix-bug SKILL.md for "WORKTREE_TRACKING:start" in the Step 0.5 section
   - test_task_execution_worktree_tracking_start_before_checkpoint1: assert "WORKTREE_TRACKING:start" appears before "CHECKPOINT 1/6" in task-execution.md
3. All 6 tests must FAIL (RED) when run before Task 2 is implemented.
4. Run bash tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh to confirm all tests fail RED.
5. Add .test-index entries for all 4 source files (fuzzy match cannot auto-detect these):
   - plugins/dso/docs/contracts/worktree-tracking-comment.md: tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh
   - plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md: tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh [test_sprint_skill_worktree_tracking_start_present]
   - plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md: tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh [test_fixbug_skill_worktree_tracking_start_present]
   - plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md: tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh [test_task_execution_worktree_tracking_start_before_checkpoint1]
6. chmod +x tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh

## Given / When / Then
Given: the repository does NOT yet have worktree-tracking-comment.md or WORKTREE_TRACKING:start sections in any SKILL.md file
When: bash tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh is run
Then: all 6 tests fail (non-zero exit) because the implementation files do not yet exist/contain the required sections

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh
- [ ] All 6 tests fail RED when run on unmodified codebase
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index has entry for plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md with RED marker [test_sprint_skill_worktree_tracking_start_present]
  Verify: grep -q 'test_sprint_skill_worktree_tracking_start_present' "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index"
- [ ] .test-index has entry for plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md with RED marker [test_fixbug_skill_worktree_tracking_start_present]
  Verify: grep -q 'test_fixbug_skill_worktree_tracking_start_present' "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index"
- [ ] .test-index has entry for plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md with RED marker [test_task_execution_worktree_tracking_start_before_checkpoint1]
  Verify: grep -q 'test_task_execution_worktree_tracking_start_before_checkpoint1' "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (pre-existing failures excluded)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
